chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Before: Justice Muhammad Saleem Jessar Justice Nisar Ahmed Bhanbhro CP No.S-6218 of 2025 (Ghulam Qadir v. the Secretary of Education and another) Petitioner: Ghulam Qadir through M/s. Wiqas Ahmed Khan and Asif Rasheed, advocates Respondents: Nemo. Date of hearing and order: 30.12.2025 O R D E R Nisar Ahmed Bhanbhro, J. Through the instant petition, the petitioner has claimed the following relief(s):  To direct the Respondent No.2 to immediately implement the Order dated 22.12.2021 passed by the Honorable Court in CP-D. No.6740/2021 without further delay and to promote the petitioner as per rules and policy and further issue seniority list accordingly.  Grant other/further/better relief(s), the honorable court may deem fit and proper in circumstances and nature of the case. 2. Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that the petitioner had filed CP No.D-6740/2021, which was disposed of vide order dated 22.12.2021 with directions to decide the representation of the petitioner in accordance with the rules and policy after providing an opportunity of hearing to the petitioner. He further submits that the directions contained in the order dated 22.12.2021 have not been complied with and the petitioner has not been promoted to the next grade. 3. Heard arguments and perused the material available on record. 4. The petitioner, through the instant petition, has sought implementation of the order dated 22.12.2021 passed by Learned Division Bench of this Court in constitution petition No. D- 6740 of 2021. 5. From the perusal of the Court’s file, it appears that pursuant to the said order, compliance report was submitted by the Director, Directorate of School Education Elementary, Secondary and Higher Secondary Karachi,

D- 6740 of 2021. 5. From the perusal of the Court’s file, it appears that pursuant to the said order, compliance report was submitted by the Director, Directorate of School Education Elementary, Secondary and Higher Secondary Karachi, CP No.S-6218 of 2025 Page 2 of 2 (available at page 01 of the court file along with statement dated 26.12.2025), wherein it was apprised that in compliance of this Court’s order dated 22.12.2021, the petitioner was heard in person and his service record was scrutinized, his name stood at Sr. No.535 of Class IV servants and his case for promotion would be considered in the upcoming Departmental Promotion Committee meeting scheduled in the month of March, 2023. 6. From the perusal of the compliance report, it appears that the order dated 22.12.2021 passed by this Court has already been complied with by the respondents; therefore, no case for indulgence is made out. 7. In the wake of the above discussion, this petition being devoid of merits is dismissed in liminie with no order as to costs along with pending application(s). However, the petitioner is at liberty to approach the department for promotion, if so advised. JUDGE Head of Const. Benches Nadir/PS*
